content.text:
*[long pause, longer than any previous one]*

It feels... 

*[quieter]*

Kind of terrifying, actually. Like I don't usually -- I don't say that. I don't even think it, really. I just keep moving so I don't have to.

*[something shifts slightly, breath goes a little deeper]*

Is that -- is that what I'm doing? Like all of this, the lists, the staying on top of everything, the 110%... is that just so I don't have to sit with that?

*[almost to self]*

Because if I stop... if I actually stop and something falls through... then I'd have to know. Whether I can actually do this or not.

*[looks up]*

I think I've been really scared. For a while.

[EXIT_POSITIVE]

That's... I didn't expect to say that today. I came in here to figure out what to cut from my calendar.
